description: Open-source CMSIS-DAP flasher, verifier, and RTT debugger powered by DAP.js, with full MCP integration for AI-assisted firmware development.
capabilities.untrustedWorkspaces.descrip: This extension writes firmware to hardware devices via CMSIS-DAP. It requires a trusted workspace.
config.target.mcu: Currently selected target MCU identifier (e.g. nordic/nrf54/nrf54l15).
config.hexFile: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the selected .hex file.
config.flash.verifyAfterFlash: Automatically run verify after a successful flash.
config.autoFlash.enabled: Watch the selected .hex file and re-flash on change.
config.autoFlash.confirmBeforeFlash: Show a confirmation dialog before each auto-flash (safer mode).
config.rtt.scanStart: RTT control block scan start address (hex).
config.rtt.scanRange: RTT control block scan range in bytes (hex).
config.rtt.pollingInterval: RTT read polling interval in milliseconds.
config.mcp.enabled: Enable the bundled MCP server and command bridge for AI tools.
config.mcp.sessionLogSize: Maximum number of command entries retained in the MCP session log.
config.log.level: Log level for the FreeOCD output channel.
config.showWalkthroughOnFirstActivation: Show the Getting Started walkthrough on the first activation.
viewsWelcome.connection:
No CMSIS-DAP probe connected yet.
[Connect Probe](command:freeocd.connectProbe)
Learn more about [FreeOCD](https://github.com/FreeOCD/freeocd-vscode-extension).
viewsWelcome.target:
No target MCU selected.
[Select Target MCU](command:freeocd.selectTargetMcu)
You can also [import a target definition](command:freeocd.importTargetDefinition).
walkthrough.title: Get Started with FreeOCD
walkthrough.description: Flash firmware and debug embedded targets via CMSIS-DAP in four steps.
walkthrough.step.connect.title: Connect a CMSIS-DAP probe
walkthrough.step.connect.description:
Plug in a supported probe (DAPLink, CMSIS-DAP, Picoprobe, XIAO with CMSIS-DAP firmware) and click Connect.
[Connect Probe](command:freeocd.connectProbe)
walkthrough.step.selectTarget.title: Choose a target MCU
walkthrough.step.selectTarget.descriptio:
Pick a built-in target (nRF54L15 at launch) or import your own target definition.
[Select Target MCU](command:freeocd.selectTargetMcu)
walkthrough.step.selectHex.title: Pick a firmware .hex
walkthrough.step.selectHex.description:
Select an Intel HEX file to flash. You can optionally enable auto-flash on save.
[Select .hex File](command:freeocd.selectHexFile)
walkthrough.step.firstFlash.title: Flash your firmware
walkthrough.step.firstFlash.description:
Run your first flash. Progress is reported with cancellation support.
[Flash](command:freeocd.flash)
taskDefinition.action: Action to perform: flash, verify, or recover.
taskDefinition.target: Target MCU identifier (overrides the current selection).
taskDefinition.verify: Verify after flash (overrides the default setting).
